title: dactylorchis majalis var. albiflora
intro: Dactylorchis majalis var. albiflora is a variety of the Dactylorchis majalis orchid, commonly known as the Snowy Summer Green Orchid or Dactylorchis. The medicinal properties of Dactylorchis majalis var. albiflora include its ability to be used as a diuretic and to help alleviate symptoms of fever and inflammation. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to lower blood pressure and help to treat various kidney and urinary issues. Dactylorchis majalis var. albiflora can be prepared as a herbal remedy through infusion or decoction, often used to treat various health conditions due to its purported medicinal properties.
